name: AlphaQuant
description: AI agent specialising in quantitative trading strategy analysis using the Impulse Flow Alpha pattern (Impulse -> Consolidation -> Breakout) on BTC-USDT daily data.

skills.name: Explain Strategy
skills.description: Explains the Impulse Flow Alpha trading strategy in plain English, including entry conditions for long and short setups.
examples: Explain the Impulse Flow Alpha strategy.
How does this trading strategy work?
What is the impulse consolidation breakout pattern?

skills.name: Analyze Performance
skills.description: Interprets backtest performance metrics including net return, annualised return, Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar ratios, and maximum drawdown.
examples: What does a Sharpe ratio of 1.96 mean?

skills.name: Evaluate Risk
skills.description: Summarises stress test results (trade dropout, Monte-Carlo shuffle, Gaussian diffusion, parameter perturbation) and lists forward-looking risks.
examples: What do the stress tests show?
Is the strategy robust to parameter changes?

skills.name: Generate Signal
skills.description: Runs the Impulse Flow Alpha signal engine on provided OHLC data and returns LONG / SHORT / FLAT signal for the latest bar.
examples: Generate a signal for this OHLC data: [...]
What is the current trade signal?
Should I go long or short based on this data?

skills.name: Run Backtest
skills.description: Runs the full Impulse Flow Alpha backtest engine on user-supplied OHLC data (JSON array or CSV text) and returns live-computed metrics: net return, annualised return, Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, max drawdown, win rate, profit factor, and a full trade log summary.
examples: Run a backtest on this data: [...]
Simulate the strategy on my dataset.
Run full backtest and show all metrics.
